presets.name: baseline
presets.description: Current shipped formula: CAPS-v1 coefficients, arithmetic mean.

presets.name: windowed-harmonic-8
presets.description: CAPS-v1 per-move, sliding-window harmonic mean (size 8) aggregator.

presets.name: steeper-gradient
presets.description: Steeper centipawn gradient (0.0045) with arithmetic mean: checks how much EP shape alone matters.

presets.name: caps2-like
presets.description: Combined tweak: steeper gradient + sharper per-move decay + windowed harmonic aggregator.
